description:

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1902

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1902.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:

python3-wheel-wheel-0.41.2-5.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
python3-wheel-0.41.2-5.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm
python3-wheel-wheel-0.41.2-5.el10_1.1.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/python-wheel-0.41.2-5.el10_1.1.src.rpm
